form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At debut, second last of 8 at this track on February 13 over 1000m, 18 len behind Marynda carrying 55kg at $18.65. Second-up 4th of 8 at this track on March 21 over 1100m, in the wet; 7 len behind Sally Ride with 55kg at $96.35. Hard to have.
